message:
🐛 fix: expand rewards scope to all kubestellar repos (#2981)

The rewards search was limited to 3 specific repos (console,
console-marketplace, console-kb), so contributions to kubestellar/docs
and other repos were not counted. Changed default from individual repo
filters to org:kubestellar to cover all repos in the org.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
